required_preferences.fact: Suspends monthly game nights with his wife while mother-in-law is recovering — opts for quieter evenings involving the whole family instead

supersedes.fact: Plans monthly game nights with his wife — never lets work obligations interfere with these evenings

required_preferences.fact: Delegates both routine server maintenance and legacy migration tasks to direct reports, only personally overseeing major cross-team incidents or critical migrations

supersedes.fact: Delegates routine server maintenance to team members — only handles escalations personally

required_preferences.fact: Prefers text message check-ins with parents rather than phone calls — only calls during their visits
Completes fasting blood tests every Monday morning at a designated clinic before starting the workday — never delays or reschedules unless medically excused
Participates in mandatory cross-team standup meetings every Monday and Wednesday morning to synchronize migration progress — never skips these regardless of ongoing outages
Runs dishwashers and laundry only after 9pm to avoid interrupting family time
